titleStmt.title: SII 41.285: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 285. (A.R. No. 501 of 1905.) Jambukēśvaram, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the east wall of the third prākarā in the Jambukēśvara temple at Tiruvānaikāval.

summary.p: This records a sale of dry land by Kaḻaṉivāyil-uḍaiyān and his younger brother to the temple. The sellers had kāṇi rights in Ichaṇaikkuṟai, a kuṟaipaṟṟu of Kīḻpalāṟu in Pāchchil-kūṟṟam in Rājarājavaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanaccakravarttikaḷ śrīrājarājarājarāja = [Picture]tevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 6 vatu tulānāyaṟṟu purvvapakṣattu pradhamaiyum cevvāykiḻamaiyum peṟ
ṟa cotināḷ teṉkarai paṇṭikulācaṉi vaḷanāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Āti caṇṭeśvaratevarkaṉmikaḷu
kku vaṭakarai rājarājarājarāja = [Picture]vaḷa nāṭṭup pācciṟ kūṟṟattuk kiḻpalāṟṟuk kuṟaippaṟṟu Icaṇaikkuṟaik kāṇi Uṭaiya kaḻaṉivāyiluṭaiyāṉ A
ṉumaṉamuṭaiyāṉum Ivaṉ tampi nampiyum Ivviruvom puṉcey nilavilaipramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭuk kuṭutta paricāvatu Icaṇai
kkuṟait talaikkuṟaiyil nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭukkiṟa nilattukku Icaitta kiḻpāṟkellai Ūṟpotu talattuṟai mukkāl nilattu
kku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai ciṟṟāṟu niroṭukālukku vaṭakkum mipāṟkellaiūṟpotu Amaṇkuṭaiyāṉtaṭi nilat
tukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai vaṭavāṟṟu niroṭu kālukkutteṟkum Āka Iṉṉāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa taṭi
Iraṇṭiṉāl nilam 1 Iraṇṭumā mun=tiri Innilam Oṉṟe Iraṇṭumā mun(ra)tirikaiyum Iṟṟai ṉāḷāl viṟṟukkuṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa Emmi
licainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu 1000 2 100 6 Ikkācu Iraṇṭāyirattu Irunūṟṟāṟu Āvaṇakkaḷariye kāṭṭeṟṟik
kaiccelavaṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaipramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭuk kuṭuttom Āti caṇṭeśvara tevakaṉmikaḷukkuk kaḻaṉi
vāyiluṭaiyāṉ Aṉumaṉamuṭaiyāṉum Ivaṉ tampi nampiyum Ivviruvom Iṉṉilam Oṉṟe Iraṇṭumā muntirikaikkum
Ikkācu Iraṇṭāyirattu Irunūṟṟāṟume vilaiyāvutākavum Ituve porumāvaṟutip poruṭ celavolaiyāvutākavum I
tuvallatu veṟu porumāvaṟutipporuṭ celavolai kāṭṭakkaṭavatallātakavum Iṉṉilattu meṉokkiṉa maramuṅ
kiḻṉokkiṉa kiṇaṟukaḷum maṉaikaḷum potuvum potātiyum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭa Urimaikaḷum Akappaṭa mikutikkuṟaivu
ḷḷaṭaṅka nilam Oṉṟe Iraṇṭumā muntirikaikkum Ivar veṇṭumpote pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭukkak kaṭavomākavum kuṭu
ttilomākil Intappuṉceypramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭepramāṇamāvatākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu vilaikkaṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟakko
ṇṭu viṟṟu vilaipramāṇa Icaivuttiṭṭuk kuṭuttom Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvara teva
varkaṉmikaḷukku kaḻaṉivāyiluṭaiyāṉ Aṉumaṉamuṭaiyāṉum Ivaṉ tampi nampiyum Ivviruvom Ippaṭikku Ivai kaḻaṉi
vāyiluṭaiyāṉ Aṉumaṉamuṭaiyāṉ sayiñai Āṉamaikku Ivvūrk kaṇakku vaṭikuṭaiyāṉ kaṇakku koṭṭuṭaiyā
Aṟivu poṉṉampalakūttaṉ Eḻuttu Itu kaḻaṉivāyiluṭaiyāṉ nampi sayiñai Āṉamaikku
Ivai nāṇaṟkuṟai Aracūr keḻutavaṉ tirucciṟṟampalanampi Eḻuttu Itu meṉāṭṭuṭaiyaṉ Aṟivu sayiñai Āṉamaikku
m Ippaṭi Aṟivukkum Ivai miceṅkiḷināṭṭu veḷāṉeḻuttu Itu pāṭaluṭaiyāṉ Amutāṇṭāṉ Aṟivusa
yiñai Āṉamaikkum Ippaṭi Aṟivukku Ivai pūṇṭi Uṭaiyāṉ pañcanetivāṉeḻuttu Itu pālaiyūr ki
ḻavaṉ kāḷaṉ Aṟivu sayiñai Āṉamaikkum Ippaṭi Aṟivukkum Ivai Oḷipati Uṭaiyāṉ Iravāṭuvāṉ tiruveṇ
ṇāmalaip perumāṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai taṇṭaṅkuṭaiyāṉeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟi viḻupparaiyaṉeṉ
Digital edition of SII 41.285 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
